---
name: Bug report
about: Something doesn't work the way it should
title: "[bug] "
labels: bug
---

## What happened

A clear description of the unexpected behaviour.

## What you expected to happen

What should have happened instead.

## Reproduction

Minimal recipe / command that triggers the issue:

```yaml
# Paste the smallest YAML that reproduces it
```

```sh
$ curveforge build minimal-repro.yml
# Paste the actual output / error
```

## Environment

- curveforge version: `curveforge --version`
- Python version: `python --version`
- OS: macOS / Linux / Windows
